case_title: ANDERSON,LAURA J. VS WOMACK'S SALON ACADEMY et al

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO ELLA WOMACK RETURNED SIGNED.

ENTERED FOR $1350. INSTEAD OF $350. $350.00 IS CORRECT. NOTICE FOR TIME PAYMENT IS DENIED.
